The '''Echani Ritual Brand''' was a type of [[double-bladed sword]] used in ritual combat by [[Echani Firedancer]]s. The [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] used the [[Sword/Legends|blade]] in a graceful pattern of dodging and slicing, causing the combat to appear similar to a dance. The [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapon]] consisted of two [[Cortosis-weave]] blades joined in the center by a [[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Hilt/Legends|hilt]]. It was capable of withstanding a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="KOTOR" /> 

The Echani [[General/Legends|general]] [[Yusanis]] once owned a [[Yusanis's Brand|Brand]] and used the [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and later when [[Gender/Legends|he]] challenged the fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] to a duel, in which he was killed.<ref name="KOTOR" /> In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire]], Yusanis' Brand was sold by the [[Paaerduag]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. During the same time another Echani Ritual Brand was owned by<ref name="KOTOR" /> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] female<ref name="Gender">Game files from ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' establish [[Kebla Yurt]] as having a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] head model.</ref> [[Kebla Yurt]], who ran an [[Kebla Yurt's Equipment Emporium|Equipment Emporium]] in the [[Upper City]] of the planet [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. Unlike much of Yurt's other stock, the Brand was not confiscated by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] during their [[Capture of Taris|occupation]] of the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] and was thus for sale at her shop for two-hundred eighty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Echani Ritual Brand first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] developed by [[BioWare]]. The weapons are sold by multiple non-player characters, whose interactions are optional and do not affect plot or alignment.<ref name="KOTOR" />
